Notes: Add a CNAME at an owner that already has an A RRset, then query both A and CNAME to observe whether the server rejects the UPDATE, accepts and removes the A RRset, or leaves the existing data unchanged.

Steps.Description: Attempt to add a CNAME at host2.campus.edu., which already has an A RRset.

Steps.Name: host2.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME was installed.

Steps.Name: host2.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the pre-existing A RRset was preserved or removed.
